subcodes.first_line: O thou who art a well-wisher of the human world! The article that was published in the Petersburg journal was in the utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خیر خواه عالم انسانی مقاله که در جریده سنت پطرز بورغ مندرج بود در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @newspapers and the media; publications, @thankfulness; gratitude, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
